tool.name: EnzyWizard Integrate
tool.description: Integrate multiple EnzyWizard JSON reports into a graph representation
tool.command: mkdir -p input_dir && unzip -q '$input_zip' -d input_dir && enzywizard-integrate -i input_dir -o ./ $strict

expand.name: input_zip
expand.label: Input report directory (zip)
expand.help: Zip archive containing EnzyWizard JSON reports to integrate.

tool.help: Integrate multiple EnzyWizard JSON reports into a graph representation. Directory inputs are represented as zip datasets and unpacked explicitly inside this wrapper command in the Galaxy job working directory. Outputs are exposed as discovered dataset collections.
